title: pterocephalus afghanicus subsp. khorassanicus
intro: Pterocephalus afghanicus subsp. khorassanicus, also known as the Khorasan pterocephalus, is a plant species belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. It is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of Iran, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and also to reduce pain and inflammation. Pterocephalus afghanicus subsp. khorassanicus is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
